title: pyrus rubra
intro: Pyrus rubra, also known as the Chinese pear or mountain pear, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree native to Asia. The bark and leaves of the Pyrus rubra plant have been traditionally used in medicine due to their anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pyrus rubra include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Pyrus rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
